English: All things are but games; only LIFE is real and eternal.

Chinese: 不易中变易，变易中不易
English: Within change, there is the unchanging; within the unchanging, there is change.

Chinese: 万法归宗，万教归一，天下一家，世界大同
English: All paths and teachings return to one source. All religions and philosophies converge toward the Greatest Creator. One world, one family—harmony in the New Era.
nation, political party, religion, and family

Notes: In Lifechanyuan writings, the ripened grain symbolizes matured LIFE ready to be elevated.
